name: Scroll
description: Scroll (parameterized track+thumb visual, 3 sizes x 2 styles) and ScrollArea (a genuinely working custom scrollbar wrapper that computes thumb size/position from real scrollTop/scrollHeight/clientHeight and hides the native scrollbar).
sourceNote: The Figma component was a static track+thumb visual with the thumb fixed at the vertical center; here `Scroll` genuinely parameterizes thumb size/position via `thumbRatio`/`thumbOffset` props, and `ScrollArea` derives those from a real scroll container's metrics via a scroll listener + ResizeObserver — a working custom scrollbar, not a decorative fixed thumb, matching this project's precedent (DatePicker, Pagination, RatingBar) of favoring genuine behavior over literal mockup replication.

thumbRatio.description: 0-1, thumb height as a fraction of the track

thumbOffset.description: 0-1, thumb position along the available track space
